quizzes.title: How Logs Are Used to Trace a Bug
quizzes.subtitle: From log levels to stack traces
quizzes.description: Test your understanding of how application logs work, what information they contain, and how developers use them to track down and diagnose bugs.

quizzes.title: How HTTPS Works
quizzes.subtitle: Secure web communication from basics to TLS internals
quizzes.description: Test your understanding of HTTPS, TLS/SSL, certificates, handshakes, and secure communication on the web.

quizzes.title: How HTTP Works
quizzes.subtitle: From request methods to status codes and headers
quizzes.description: Test your understanding of the HyperText Transfer Protocol — the foundation of data communication on the web.

quizzes.title: How Client-Server Works
quizzes.subtitle: Requests, responses, and the architecture behind the web
quizzes.description: Test your understanding of client-server architecture — from basic request flows to load balancing, scaling, and proxy patterns.

quizzes.title: How Databases Really Read and Write Data
quizzes.subtitle: Under the hood — storage, transactions, and concurrency
quizzes.description: Test your understanding of how databases physically read and write data, covering ACID, transactions, indexing, connection pooling, WAL, MVCC, buffer pools, and more.

quizzes.title: MSSQL Query Writing Concepts
quizzes.subtitle: Understanding SQL Server Query Writing
quizzes.description: Test your conceptual understanding of how query writing works in Microsoft SQL Server. Focus is on system behavior, query logic, and design, not memorizing keywords.
